content: Matrix strategy uses matrix.include with entries for each target. Each entry specifies: runner (ubuntu-latest for linux targets, macos-latest for mac targets), target triple, and a use-cross boolean. x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu: ubuntu-latest, no cross needed. aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu: ubuntu-latest + cross=true (Docker-based). x86_64-apple-darwin: macos-latest, native cargo. aarch64-apple-darwin: macos-latest, native cargo (macOS runners support both arches via universal toolchain). houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross action handles the cargo-vs-cross selection automatically based on host+target.
